description_long: This is a roasted whole chicken with a deep golden-brown, slightly glossy skin, presented on a large, polygonal silver platter. The chicken is garnished with several small, round roasted potatoes and is laid atop a bed of green leafy vegetables, likely lettuce or cabbage, which covers most of the platter's surface. The chicken's legs are extended outward, and the wings are tucked close to the body, giving it a plump and appetizing appearance. The platter itself is metallic and angular, contrasting with the organic shapes of the food. The overall presentation suggests a festive or celebratory meal, with the food arranged to be visually appealing and inviting. No utensils or additional decorations are visible, focusing attention on the main dish.
description: A roasted whole chicken with potatoes and greens on a silver platter, arranged for an appetizing presentation.
description_view_0: A side view showing the full roasted chicken, two drumsticks, and potatoes on a bed of green leaves atop a silver platter.
description_view_1: A rear view highlighting the chicken's back, both drumsticks, and the arrangement of potatoes and greens on the platter.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the chicken's body, drumsticks, and potatoes clearly visible on the platter.
description_view_3: A front view focusing on the chicken's breast, with the drumsticks and wings extending outward, and potatoes and greens visible on the platter.
attribute_surrounding_context: The platter is resting on a flat, neutral surface with no other objects or context visible.
